codex_action: No standalone deadline; pair with Rule 70/70a path
parser_note: Use publication event as anchor for search-stage awareness, not reply deadline.
official_source: EPO Register User manual (June 2025), Main events

codex_action: No EP reply deadline from this event alone
parser_note: Useful for PCT chronology only.
official_source: EPO Register User manual (June 2025), Main events

codex_action: No standalone deadline; pair with downstream communication
parser_note: Useful for Euro-PCT search chronology.
official_source: EPO Register User manual (June 2025), Main events

source_description: New entry: Communication of intention to grant a patent
codex_action: Create 4-month candidate, but confirm exact despatch/date from document
parser_note: Use all_documents for legal date and supersession logic.

source_description: Change: Communication of intention to grant a patent
codex_action: Refresh 4-month candidate, but confirm exact despatch/date from document
parser_note: Treat as update to Rule 71(3) state.
official_source: EPO Register User manual (June 2025), Main events

codex_action: No new response deadline by default; route to remedies
parser_note: Look for underlying missed act and possible further processing/re-establishment.
official_source: EPO Register User manual (June 2025), Main events

codex_action: Route to appeal branch
parser_note: Do not treat as ordinary office action.
official_source: EPO Register User manual (June 2025), Main events

codex_action: Create opposition case state; next real deadline usually from Rule 79/OREX/DOBS
parser_note: Not itself the proprietor reply communication.

source_description: No opposition filed within time limit
codex_action: Close opposition watch for the patent
parser_note: Post-grant status update.

codex_action: Close Rule 82 branch once publication confirmed
parser_note: Publication, not the underlying communication itself.

codex_action: Route to appeal branch
parser_note: Decision event.

source_description: Opposition procedure terminated - date of legal effect published
codex_action: Close opposition case state
parser_note: Termination marker.

source_description: Lapse of the patent in a contracting state
codex_action: Update national status only
parser_note: National post-grant layer, not central EP procedure.

codex_action: Link to underlying missed act using STEP_DESCRIPTION_NAME
parser_note: Reason strings include missed examination reply, EESR reply, prior-art info, fees, etc.

source_description: Invitation to indicate the basis for amendments

parser_note: Good structured marker for Rule 137(4)-type issue.

codex_action: Create 4-month candidate from DATE_OF_DISPATCH; prefer actual document despatch/date
parser_note: Also stores grant fee / print fee / translation dates.

source_description: Disapproval of the communication of intention to grant the patent
codex_action: Use as applicant action affecting grant branch
parser_note: May lead to fresh Rule 71(3) or resumed examination.

source_description: Communication from the examining division in a limitation procedure
codex_action: Create deadline from DATE_OF_DISPATCH + time-limit in record

codex_action: Store OP date(s); parse annex separately for Rule 116 final date

codex_action: Create deadline from DATE_OF_DISPATCH + time-limit in record

source_description: Invitation to provide information on prior art

source_description: Preparation for maintenance of the patent in an amended form

codex_action: Attach to missed act using STEP_DESCRIPTION_NAME and record result

source_description: Despatch of invitation to pay additional claims fees

source_description: Request for correction of the decision to grant filed
